student_summary.name: Aarav
student_summary.profile_headline: A builder-oriented student interested in coding, business, and content creation.

career_paths.title: Full Stack Developer
career_paths.why_it_fits: Your interest in coding and building projects aligns perfectly with software development.
career_paths.day_in_the_life: Mornings start with system architecture reviews. Afternoons are deep-work sessions building features using Next.js, while using AI for unit testing and boilerplate.

ai_exposure_breakdown.automation_pressure: High on repetitive logic and syntax.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_advantage: Solving business-specific logic that requires high context.

career_paths.starter_project: Build a personal portfolio using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

skill_gap_analysis.roadmap: Focus on learning JavaScript and React over the next 3 months.
